---
name: Security review
about: Report a security concern or threat-model gap in Flowvault
title: "Security review: "
labels: security-review-wanted, security
---

## Summary

Describe the issue or question.

## Affected surface

- [ ] Hosted vaults
- [ ] Demo vault
- [ ] Local .flowvault files
- [ ] .fvault backup / restore
- [ ] Encrypted Send
- [ ] Time-locked notes
- [ ] Trusted handover
- [ ] Documentation / threat model
- [ ] Other:

## Threat model

Who is the attacker, and what do they already know or control?

## Impact

What could be exposed, modified, deleted, correlated, or denied?

## Suggested mitigation

Optional, but helpful if you have one.
